Index

A | B | C | D | E | F | G | H | I | J | L | M | N | P | R | S | T | U | V

A

  • alpha_control (scqdiff.DriftConfig attribute)
  • archetypes() (in module scqdiff.pl)

B

  • backward_integrate() (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridge method)
  • beta (scqdiff.DriftConfig attribute)
    • (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridgeConfig attribute)
  • bridge_archetypes() (in module scqdiff.pl)
  • bridge_gene_comparison() (in module scqdiff.pl)
  • bridge_genes() (in module scqdiff.pl)
  • bridge_instability() (in module scqdiff.pl)
  • bridge_source_target() (in module scqdiff.pl)
  • bridge_summary() (in module scqdiff.pl)
  • bridge_trajectories() (in module scqdiff.pl)

C

  • convergence_tol (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridgeConfig attribute)
  • coordination() (in module scqdiff.pl)

D

  • depth (scqdiff.DriftConfig attribute)
    • (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridgeConfig attribute)
  • dim (scqdiff.DriftConfig attribute)
    • (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridgeConfig attribute)
  • drift_field() (in module scqdiff.pl)
  • DriftConfig (class in scqdiff)
  • DriftField (class in scqdiff)

E

  • epsilon (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridgeConfig attribute)

F

  • fit_bridge() (in module scqdiff.tl)
  • fit_drift() (in module scqdiff.tl)
  • forward() (scqdiff.DriftField method)
  • forward_integrate() (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridge method)

G

  • get_bridge_instability_genes() (in module scqdiff.tl)
  • get_instability_genes() (in module scqdiff.tl)

H

  • hidden (scqdiff.DriftConfig attribute)
    • (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridgeConfig attribute)

I

  • infer_regulators() (in module scqdiff.tl)
  • instability_genes() (in module scqdiff.pl)

J

  • jacobian() (scqdiff.DriftField method)
    • (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridge method)
  • jacobian_approx() (scqdiff.DriftField method)
  • jacobian_dim_warn (scqdiff.DriftConfig attribute)

L

  • load_network() (in module scqdiff.tl)
  • lr (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridgeConfig attribute)

M

  • max_iterations (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridgeConfig attribute)

N

  • n_score_steps (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridgeConfig attribute)

P

  • patience (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridgeConfig attribute)
  • prepare_trajectory() (in module scqdiff.pp)

R

  • regulator_barplot() (in module scqdiff.pl)
  • regulator_heatmap() (in module scqdiff.pl)
  • regulator_network() (in module scqdiff.pl)
  • regulator_profiles() (in module scqdiff.pl)
  • regulator_scatter() (in module scqdiff.pl)
  • regulator_summary() (in module scqdiff.pl)

S

  • SchrodingerBridge (class in scqdiff)
  • SchrodingerBridgeConfig (class in scqdiff)
  • sensitivity() (in module scqdiff.pl)
  • sinkhorn_max_iter (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridgeConfig attribute)
  • sinkhorn_tol (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridgeConfig attribute)
  • summary_figure() (in module scqdiff.pl)

T

  • train_bridge() (scqdiff.SchrodingerBridge method)

U

  • use_spectral_norm (scqdiff.DriftConfig attribute)
  • use_velocity_prior (scqdiff.DriftConfig attribute)

V

  • vel (scqdiff.DriftField attribute)
  • vel_conf_power (scqdiff.DriftConfig attribute)
  • vel_k (scqdiff.DriftConfig attribute)
  • vel_scale (scqdiff.DriftConfig attribute)
  • vel_tau (scqdiff.DriftConfig attribute)
  • vel_time_mode (scqdiff.DriftConfig attribute)
